summary: List coordination issue viewpoints (legacy + Model Manager, REST v2.0)
description:
**GET collection** â€” returns every viewpoint mapping on the issue. **Legacy** rows (join has
`bim_viewpoint_id`) use **`BimViewpointBlueprint`** view **`:procore_v0_1`** â€” the **same** shape as
the **`viewpoints`** array on the coordination issue resource (`CoordinationIssueBlueprint` view
`:extended_with_viewpoint_v0_1`): `camera_data`, `sections_data`, `redlines_data`, `snapshot`,
`bim_file_id`, `uuid`, numeric `id`, etc.

**MM-backed** rows (`viewpoint_uuid` only) are loaded in bulk from M...

parameters.name: view
parameters.description:
When `ids_only`, response body is `{ "data": [...] }`: legacy mappings use integer
`bim_viewpoint_id`; MM-backed mappings use UUID strings. Order matches the full list (`position`,
`created_at`).

parameters.name: primary
parameters.description:
When `true`, only mappings marked primary on the issue are returned. When `false`, only non-primary
mappings. When omitted, all mappings are returned (subject to pagination). Applies to both the fu...

parameters.name: included
parameters.description:
**Ignored.** Legacy list items always return the full `:procore_v0_1` blueprint shape; MM-backed
rows always return the full Model Manager viewpoint object.

200.description: OK â€” merged viewpoint list or id list when `view=ids_only`

502.description: Model Manager returned 5xx while loading MM-backed viewpoints for this page
